result.stdout:
Chickensoft.Chicken v1.0.0

USAGE
  dotnet Chickensoft.Chicken.dll [options]
  dotnet Chickensoft.Chicken.dll [command] [...]

OPTIONS
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

COMMANDS
  addons            Manage addons. Subcommands: addons install, addons link, addons symbolic, addons unlink.
  egg               Generate folders from templates. Subcommands: egg crack.

You can run `dotnet Chickensoft.Chicken.dll [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

result.stdout:
Chickensoft.Chicken v1.0.0

USAGE
  dotnet Chickensoft.Chicken.dll addons [options]
  dotnet Chickensoft.Chicken.dll addons [command] [...]

DESCRIPTION
  Manage addons.

OPTIONS
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 

COMMANDS
  install           Installs addons. 
  link              Create a symbolic link to a directory. 
  symbolic          Determines if a directory is a symlink. 
  unlink            Remove a symbolic link to a directory. 

You can run `dotnet Chickensoft.Chicken.dll addons [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

result.stdout:
Chickensoft.Chicken v1.0.0

USAGE
  dotnet Chickensoft.Chicken.dll addons link <source> <target> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Create a symbolic link to a directory.

PARAMETERS
* source            Directory source (original directory you are linking to). 
* target            Directory target (directory which points to the source directory). 

OPTIONS
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

result.stdout:
Chickensoft.Chicken v1.0.0

USAGE
  dotnet Chickensoft.Chicken.dll egg crack <name> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Create a new project based on an existing egg (template).

PARAMETERS
* name              Name of the output folder for the generated project. 

OPTIONS
  -e|--egg          Template to use. Can be a git url, a local path, or a template name. 
  -c|--checkout     The branch to checkout. Use `tags/{name}` for specific tags/versions. 
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

OPTIONS

  -c|--checkout     The branch to checkout. Use `tags/{name}` for specific tags/versions. 
  -h|--help         Shows help text.
